sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Hello World');
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, name) VALUES (2, 'Goodbye World');
SELECT name FROM test_strings WHERE endsWith(name, 'World');
UPDATE test_strings SET name = 'Hello Universe' WHERE endsWith(name, 'World');
